scripts.queue:create: wrangler queues create brand-os-publish && wrangler queues create brand-os-publish-dlq
scripts.vectorize:create: wrangler vectorize create brand-os-brands --dimensions=768 --metric=cosine && wrangler vectorize create brand-os-competitors --dimensions=768 --metric=cosine && wrangler vectorize create brand-os-leads --dimensions=768 --metric=cosine && wrangler vectorize create brand-os-sections --dimensions=768 --metric=cosine
